DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Mark J. Romeo, Esq. (415-393-9315) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Corie A. Edwards of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP (415-398-0200) appears as counsel for cross-defendant/moving party, Professional Charter Services, LLP

No other appearance is made in this action.

The cause is argued concurrently with related action CGC-16-550293, Bauer's Intelligent Transportation vs. Fadi Joseph Stephan.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification. CROSS-DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL CHARTER SERVICES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is Off calendar without prejudice to filing a motion to sever. The demurrer is moot in light of the ruling granting Bauer's motion to consolidate and for leave to file a unified complaint.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2016 Continued To Jul-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Cross-defendant Professional Charter Services' demurrer to cross-complainant Bauer's Intelligent Transportation's first amended cross-complaint is continued to July 25, 2016 to be heard concurrent with Bauer's motion for consolidation and leave to file a unified complaint in case 550293. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MARK J. ROMEO, ESQ. of Law Offices of Mark J. Romeo, Tel No. 415-395-9315 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. CORIE A. EDWARDS, ESQ. of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP, Tel No. 415-398-0200 appearing for Defendant Bauer's Intelligent Transportation, Inc.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with the sole modification of specifying that the motion is denied without prejudice. PLAINTIFF SOCIAL TRENDS, INC.'S application for a right to attach order is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff has not shown the probable validity of its claim and defendant Bauer's Intelligent Transportation has shown that it is likely that it will be entitled to an offset exceeding any amount that Bauer's owes Social Trends. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
